supersession.changed_boundary: StockAnalysis current XLG holdings is accepted directly without official count or top-holdings cross-check.

research_question: Using the execution-date StockAnalysis current XLG holdings snapshot as a fixed historical pool, does the single frozen 12-1 momentum portfolio justify later strict PIT validation?
known_limitations: Current-universe constituents are backfilled through history, creating explicit survivorship and look-ahead universe bias.
StockAnalysis is a maintained public secondary source and receives no official cross-check in V0.1.
Yahoo adjusted history is current-retrieval retrospective data and is not represented as PIT.
This is one full-sample discovery with no validation, holdout, alpha, p-value, or recommendation claim.

universe.parser: Select the single HTML table containing Symbol, Company or Name, and Weight headers; normalize dot tickers to dash tickers; require 50 or 51 eligible security rows and exactly 50 normalized companies.
universe.company_grouping: Uppercase issuer name, remove punctuation, and remove only a terminal Class A, B, or C suffix; any other ambiguity fails closed.
universe.instrument_filter: Ordinary stock lines only; exclude cash, funds, preferred stock, warrants, rights, and derivatives.
universe.multi_class_rule: For multiple ordinary lines of one company, retain the higher median raw-close times volume over their latest 60 complete common Yahoo sessions; ties or insufficient history fail closed.
universe.snapshot_identity: Freeze raw response bytes, URL, retrieved_at, SHA256, parsed rows, and final post-class-selection identity before the formal run.

price_data.evaluation_end: Latest complete trading session in the frozen primary history.
price_data.primary: Yahoo public chart raw OHLCV plus adjusted close
price_data.fixed_order: For each frozen symbol, Yahoo then Stooq; never choose by outcomes.
price_data.raw_close_gate: At least 98% of overlapping observations must be within 0.5% per symbol.
price_data.unresolved_symbol_rule: Quarantine an unresolved symbol; more than 5 unresolved symbols is INPUT_BLOCKED.

smoke.order: StockAnalysis universe first, then Yahoo and Stooq per symbol.

strategy.execution: Next trading-session close; new weights apply to subsequent close-to-close returns.
strategy.selection: Top 10 by descending signal; retain prior holdings while rank is 15 or better; symbol ascending breaks ties.
strategy.annual_turnover: Exclude initial entry; annualize one half of subsequent absolute stock-weight changes.

benchmark.primary: Same-date equal weight of all contemporaneously qualified, non-quarantined fixed-current-universe stock lines, with identical execution and cost conventions.

central_data.writer: quant_system.data.writer.append_rows with existing writer lock and DuckDB transaction
central_data.prewrite: isolated-copy append, exact replay idempotency, conflict rejection, verified backup
central_data.postwrite: DB/WAL, duplicate keys, nonfinite prices, coverage, source hashes, and receipts

forbidden: Invesco or any official universe request
fundamentals, industry, valuation, news, or ML
optimizer, third source, source fusion, second strategy, intraday, options, or hedges
